title: The Emblems and Names (Prevention of Improper Use) Act, 1950
full_text: The Emblems and Names (Prevention of Improper Use) Act, 1950 संप्रतीक और नाम (अनुचित प्रयोगनिवारण) अधिनियम, 1950 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1950-12 Act Number: 12 Enactment Date: 1950-03-01 Act Year: 1950 Short Title: The Emblems and Names (Prevention of Improper Use) Act, 1950 Hindi Title: संप्रतीक और नाम (अनुचित प्रयोगनिवारण) अधिनियम, 1950 Long Title: An Act to prevent the improper use of certain emblems and names for professional and commercial purposes. Ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution Department: Department of Consumer Affairs Enforcement Date: 01-09-1950 Notification: 1st September, 1950, vide notification No. S.R.O. 441, dated 26th August, 1950, see Gazette of India, 1950, part II, s. 3. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Emblems and Names (Prevention of Improper Use) Act, 1950 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent, application and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Prohibition of improper use of certain emblems and names. Section 4. Prohibition of registration of certain companies, etc. Section 5. Penalty. Section 6. Previous sanction for prosecution. Section 7. Savings. Section 8. Power of the Central Government to amend the Schedule. Section 9. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Schedule 1.
